description: You received a discharge summary indicating patient Robert Thompson (DOB: 1962-07-14) had a severe anaphylactic reaction to latex. Log in to NOSH (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!) and add a critical safety alert to his chart with the exact text: "SEVERE LATEX ALLERGY - Anaphylaxis risk. Use only non-latex gloves and equipment for all procedures. Confirmed by Springfield General Hospital discharge summary dated 2024-11-15." Ensure the alert is saved and active.

metadata.full_alert_text: SEVERE LATEX ALLERGY - Anaphylaxis risk. Use only non-latex gloves and equipment for all procedures. Confirmed by Springfield General Hospital discharge summary dated 2024-11-15.
